title: SeaWave Power Generator With Solar
description: Hybrid marine energy harvester combining an oscillating water column wave energy converter with a solar PV panel and LiFePO₄ battery, providing power to a coastal monitoring buoy.
objective: Generate ≥ 10 W from waves + solar combined; charge 20 Ah LiFePO₄; supply 5 W sensor payload continuously; operational life > 1 year.
constraints: Coastal deployment; wave height 0.5–2 m; 20 W solar panel; BOM < ₹20 000.
supporting_fact_titles: Wave Energy Conversion — Oscillating Water Column Principle
design_element_titles: Oscillating Water Column Wave Energy Converter
Solar Panel + LiFePO₄ MPPT Power System

element_usage_notes.Oscillating Water Column Wave Energy Con: OWC chamber drives Wells turbine-generator; 5–15 W at wave height 0.5–1.5 m.
element_usage_notes.Solar Panel + LiFePO₄ MPPT Power System: 20 W panel + 20 Ah LiFePO₄ + MPPT for daytime harvesting and storage.
